sglang.title: Reduce overhead when `fork(1)`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: 67be11c this commit fixed the race condition when copying ProgramState or StreamExceutor, but it brings overhead when the number of forked branches is 1.

vllm.title: Don't show default value for flags in `EngineArgs`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: A hotfix for #4219 that stops the default value for flag type arguments (e.g. --enforce-eager, which uses store_true) from being shown because the user might think they need to pass a value to them (e.g. for --enforce-eager the user might think they need to pass --enforce-eager True, which they don'

vllm.title: [Doc]: Update the page of adding new models
vllm.author: yefd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The _MODEL_REGISTRY  in vllm/model_executor/model_loader.py was removed, and documentation of registering models needs to update.
FIX #4235

vllm.title: Make initialization of tokenizer and detokenizer optional
vllm.author: GeauxEric
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add a flag to initialize the LLM engine to disable tokenizer.
If tokenizer is disabled, so does detokenizer.
FIX #3635
FIX #3647

vllm.title: [AMD][Hardware][Misc][Bugfix] xformer cleanup and light navi logic and CI fixes and refactoring
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is
(1) to remove xformer package and patches since right now raw flash attention api is called instead of using xformers wrapper.
(2) to facilitate gfx1100/navi3x to use triton flash-attn.
(3) still make it possible for other gfx target to use flash-attn and updated the flash-attention branc

vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] fix _is_full_nvlink detection
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After carefully reading the documentation of nvml at https://developer.nvidia.com/nvidia-management-library-nvml , I realized that pynvml works on physical device id, rather than relative index inside CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.
For example, prior to this PR, _is_full_nvlink(0, 4) will query nvlink inform
